content:
The Keeper ran out of energy drinks so Copro and Kath decided to get some for them. But not before stopping for some boba on the way.

UID: 101027240

The outfits are inspired by my favorite streetwear brands while combining them with the characters original design elements and color schemes to retain their visual identity. 

-# The environment was rendered in 3D and is a modified version of the mini mart model made by Pasha on sketchfab. https://skfb.ly/pzwKY
thread_title: Corpo and Kath at the convenience store (streetwear)
